name: My Chicago lawyer input my privileged info into AI without asking, is privilege gone?
description: Yes, waived per Heppner; AI counts as third-party.[2][3]

mainEntity.name: My Chicago lawyer input my privileged info into AI without asking, is privilege gone?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, waived per Heppner; AI counts as third-party.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Likely waived; NY's Heppner ruled AI as third-party disclosure breaking privilege. Client-initiated use without counsel direction failed protection.[2][3] Key factors: tool's no-privacy policy, purpose. Demand firm disclosure log, assess waiver scope. Sue for negligence if harmed.
